title: AGI is FAKE: The Biggest AI Lie Exposed
summary: A video essay arguing that current AI models have fundamental mathematical ceilings preventing AGI, invoking the Time Hierarchy Theorem and transformer architecture limitations. The author contends that chain-of-thought reasoning and autonomous agents cannot overcome these constraints, and that model accuracy will never reach 100 percent.
